─── THE 5 SIGNALS ─────────────────────────

1. Claude Code Gets Multi-File Editing
   Anthropic shipped multi-file editing for Claude Code. Solo developers can now refactor across files in a single command.

   BUILDER IMPACT: Directly affects tools solo developers use daily. Highly actionable — concrete steps available.

   Evidence: official_changelog

   Source: https://anthropic.com/news/claude-code-update

2. Ollama v0.8.0: Vision Model Support
   Ollama now supports vision models locally with Llama 3.2 Vision. No API key required.

   BUILDER IMPACT: Directly affects tools solo developers use daily. Opens new build possibilities.

   Evidence: official_changelog

   Source: https://github.com/ollama/ollama/releases/tag/v0.8.0

3. GitHub Copilot Agent Mode GA
   GitHub Copilot agent mode is now generally available for multi-step coding tasks. Free for individual developers.

   BUILDER IMPACT: Directly affects tools solo developers use daily. Highly actionable — concrete steps available.

   Evidence: official_blog

   Source: https://github.blog/copilot-agent-mode

4. Vercel AI SDK 5.0: Streaming Improvements
   Vercel AI SDK 5.0 ships with 50% faster streaming and built-in tool calling. Migration guide available.

   BUILDER IMPACT: Directly affects tools solo developers use daily. Highly actionable — concrete steps available.

   Evidence: official_changelog

   Source: https://github.com/vercel/ai/releases/v5.0

5. GPT-5 Released with Enhanced Reasoning
   OpenAI has released GPT-5 with 40% improvement in coding benchmarks. Available now via API.

   BUILDER IMPACT: New model capabilities may unlock new solo-dev workflows or products.

   Evidence: official_blog
